rationale.R1.3: Audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work and articulates the delta, with additional references to others.
rationale.R1.7: Audits most load-bearing citations but misses some key works.
rationale.RX.1: Marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not.
